langSelect.title: Which language can we help you in?
langSelect.subtitle: No app to install — start right away
langSelect.reassure: Scanning the QR starts everything. No install or login needed.

invalid.title: This entry link isn't valid
invalid.body: This QR or link has expired or isn't correct. Please scan the QR posted in the salon again.
invalid.thread: We couldn't find this consultation. Please double-check the link you received.
invalid.report: We couldn't find this report. Please double-check the link you received.

intake.title: Tell us the style you want
intake.subtitle: Just tap to choose, and your designer prepares ahead

returning.title: Welcome back!
returning.subtitle: We remember your last visit. How would you like to start?
returning.sameHint: Brings back your last service and hair details
returning.prefilled: We pre-filled your last answers. Just change what's different.
returning.skipProfile: Keep my hair details as they are

services.hint: You can pick more than one
services.estimateNone: Pick a service to see the estimated price
services.styleNotePlaceholder: Tell us the length, look, or any reference you have in mind

photos.hint: Upload photos of the style you want
photos.someFailed: Couldn't upload {failed} of {total} photo(s). Please try again.

hair.historyHint: Pick the treatments you had recently

concern.title: Anything you feel self-conscious about or would like us to pay attention to?

phone.hint: Leave blank if you have no Korean number
phone.benefit: Leave your number to keep and manage your past reports, and pick up the conversation when you return.

consent.label: I agree to the collection of my information and photos for style consultation.
consent.detail: Your information (including contact and photos) is used only for consultation and records. It is kept for about 90 days after the consultation, after which your contact and photos are deleted or masked.
consent.crossBorder: To enable smooth multilingual consultation, your input is automatically translated and summarized, which transfers it abroad to Google LLC's Gemini AI (USA). Data storage is entrusted to Supabase.
consent.policyLink: See our Privacy Policy for details.

intake.needService: Please pick at least one service
intake.submitError: Couldn't send. Please try again in a moment.

thread.title: Chat with your designer
thread.empty: Your consultation has started. Ask anything.

report.title: Hair InBody Report
report.subtitle: Today's service record
report.bookToast: Booking request received. The salon will contact you soon.
